# components

React component library for the web application, organized into UI primitives (headless Base UI wrappers with CVA variants) and domain-specific document management components (upload, display, confirmation modals).

## Subdirectories

- [documents/](./documents/) — Document lifecycle UI: UploadZone with drag-and-drop validation (ACCEPTED_MIME_TYPES: `application/pdf`, `application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet`, `text/markdown`, `text/plain`), DocumentCard with StatusBadge/FileIcon composition, DocumentList grid container, ReplaceDialog/DeleteDialog confirmation modals with loading state disablement
- [ui/](./ui/) — Headless UI primitives wrapping `@base-ui/react` components: Badge/Button with CVA variants, Card family with container queries, Dialog/DropdownMenu with portal rendering and animation states, Progress/Separator/Skeleton utilities, Toaster with Next.js theme integration and lucide-react icon overrides

## Architecture

Two-tier component hierarchy: `ui/` provides polymorphic design system primitives with `data-slot` attributes and `useRender` composition, `documents/` consumes UI primitives to build domain-specific features. Document components emit events upward (onUpload, onDelete, onReplace) to page-level state, modal state controlled via open/onOpenChange props. All components use Tailwind styling merged via `cn()` from `@/lib/utils`.

## File Type Validation

`documents/upload-zone.tsx` defines dual validation surface:
- HTML input: `.pdf,.xlsx,.md,.txt`
- JavaScript: MIME type array with extension fallback for `.md`/`.txt` browser inconsistencies

## Status Badge Mapping

`documents/document-card.tsx` StatusBadge renders four states:
- "pending" → "Queued" (default Badge variant)
- "processing" → "Indexing..." with animated Progress component
- "ready" → "Ready" + "{chunkCount} sections indexed"
- "error" → "Failed" (destructive Badge variant)

## Behavioral Contracts

**File Input Reset Pattern:**
```tsx
<input ref={inputRef} onChange={handler} />
// After processing:
inputRef.current.value = ''
```

**Drag State Styling:**
- Active: `border-primary bg-muted`
- Disabled: `opacity-50 pointer-events-none`

**CVA Variant Enums (ui/ components):**
- badgeVariants: `default | secondary | destructive | outline | ghost | link`
- buttonVariants: variant × size dimensions (`default | outline | secondary | ghost | destructive | link` × `default | xs | sm | lg | icon | icon-xs | icon-sm | icon-lg`)

**Data Attributes:**
- `data-slot="<component-name>"` — CSS targeting for all ui/ components
- `data-size="default" | data-size="sm"` — Card size variant
- `data-open` / `data-closed` — Dialog/DropdownMenu animation states
- `data-horizontal` / `data-vertical` — Separator orientation
- `data-inset` / `data-variant` — DropdownMenu item styling

**Time Formatting (document-card.tsx formatDate):**
- <60s: "Just now"
- <60min: "{n}m ago"
- <24hr: "{n}h ago"
- <7d: "{n}d ago"
- ≥7d: "MMM DD"
